prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: A Vault client loses access because a dynamic secret lease expires unexpectedly. Find the Go source files in hashicorp/vault that (1) issue and renew leases, (2) revoke or expire leases in the expiration manager, and (3) surface lease-expiry errors back through the request path.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the hashicorp-vault fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: A Vault client loses access because a dynamic secret lease expires unexpectedly. Find the Go source files in hashicorp/vault that (1) issue and renew leases, (2) revoke or expire leases in the expiration manager, and (3) surface lease-expiry errors back through the request path.

params.search_pattern: lease OR expiration OR renew OR revoke
